docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $616.20 FILED BY DOMINGO ADEBAYO AS TO DEFENDANT EGYPTIAN CONSULATE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-08-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $737.49 FILED BY EGYPTIAN CONSULATE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT DOMINGO ADEBAYO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-08-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF DOMINGO ADEBAYO

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DOMINGO ADEBAYO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT EGYPTIAN CONSULATE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT EGYPTIAN CONSULATE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT DOMINGO ADEBAYO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CORRESPONDENCE SENT TO PROTEM KARNOW RETURNED, FORWARDING ORDER EXPIRED.
